description_long: This object is a robust, industrial-style hanger with a thick, curved hook rising from a solid cylindrical base. The hook is broad and tapers to a rounded point, designed to support heavy loads or secure large items. The base features two prominent hexagonal nuts on either end, suggesting it can be fastened securely to a bar or rod. The entire structure has a faceted, angular surface, giving it a utilitarian and slightly stylized appearance. Its proportions and construction indicate it is intended for use in demanding urban environments such as garages, workshops, or public infrastructure. The color is a uniform light gray, resembling painted or powder-coated metal.
description: A heavy-duty, curved metal hanger with a thick hook and hexagonal nuts at the base, finished in light gray.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full curve of the hook and both hexagonal nuts on the cylindrical base.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thickness of the hook and the narrow profile of the base.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back curve of the hook and the alignment of the nuts on the base.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the hook's width and the symmetry of the base components.
